since_last: 55% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.11%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 55% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC +1.15% · Gold +1.22% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 55% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.11%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.11%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.52%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +4.24%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +4.24%, MRVL +4.11%, LRCX +3.85%, AMAT +3.79%, INTC +3.62%. Laggards: EQIX -3.74%, CRM -1.84%, NET -1.61%, NOW -1.09%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.23% at $150.13
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.23% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
